findings.description: Footer content moved to document header.
findings.evidence: The PDF contains an agency address block in the bottom footer of Page 1. The HTML changes the reading order by placing this address text near the top of the page, below the executive names.

findings.description: Memo routing header interrupted by hidden text.
findings.evidence: The PDF has a continuous visual flow for the 'To', 'From', and 'Subject' fields. The HTML breaks this logical reading order by inserting an extracted digital signature string ('Digitally signed by LYF DN...') between the 'From' and 'Subject' fields.
